title: YUDANSI Crevice Cleaning Brushs (3pcs Long Handle Hard Bristle Cleaning Tools)(Anti-Slip Small Spaces Gaps Cleaning)(Home Kitchen Bathroom Narrow Corners Floor Scrubbing) Grout Cleaner Brush

【Gift】the gap cleaning brush is a great gift for your family. It is small and lightweight, easy to remove dirt from dead corners and gaps, and keeps our family away from tedious housework.
【Guarantee】the crevice cleaning brush has undergone rigorous testing. If have any questions, you can contact us at any time, we always be here and handle it for you.
